source_section.title_label_raw: General Landscaping Requirements Exemptions for a Change of Use and Minor Additions

sections.title_label_raw: Landscaping Requirements Exemptions for a Change of Use and Minor Additions

provisions.heading_context_raw: Landscaping Requirements Exemptions for a Change of Use and Minor Additions
provisions.text: Additional hard landscaping or soft landscaping shall not be required for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Landscaping Requirements Exemptions for a Change of Use and Minor Additions
provisions.text: a change of use in a structure; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Landscaping Requirements Exemptions for a Change of Use and Minor Additions
provisions.text: an addition to any main building less than 200.0 square metres of floor area. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22) Existing Soft Landscaping

sections.title_label_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the
provisions.text: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the requirements of this Part if they are:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the
provisions.text: adequately protected from damage during development;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the
provisions.text: meet the minimum size or caliper requirements specified within the applicable section(s) of this Part; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the
provisions.text: present and in good health, as certified by a landscape architect or arborist prior to the issuance of the first occupancy permit.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Existing trees and shrubs may be counted toward the
provisions.text: Any existing tree or shrub in a required landscaped buffer may be counted as one tree or shrub toward the requirements of Sections 427 to 429. Requirement to Maintain Soft Landscaping

sections.title_label_raw: All soft landscaping required under this By-law shall be maintained.

provisions.heading_context_raw: All soft landscaping required under this By-law shall be maintained.
provisions.text: All soft landscaping required under this By-law shall be maintained. Soft Landscaping Species

sections.title_label_raw: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of
provisions.text: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of unique plant species shall be provided, as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of
provisions.text: if this Part requires the planting of a minimum of 10 trees or shrubs, but less than 20 trees or shrubs, a minimum of three different tree or shrub species are required; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of
provisions.text: if this Part requires the planting of 20 or more trees or shrubs, a minimum of four different tree or shrub species are required.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where soft landscaping is required, a minimum number of
provisions.text: Invasive or highly toxic plant species, as listed in Appendix 4, are prohibited as soft landscaping material. Soft Landscaping for Accessory Parking Lots

sections.title_label_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is located in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone, but is not located within an interior courtyard, shall meet the following soft landscaping requirements along any portion of a lot line that runs adjacent to the accessory parking lot:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: a 2.5-metre wide strip of soft landscaping; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: either:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: one shrub no less than 1.0 metre in height for every 2.0 linear metres, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: one tree that is not a shrub with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres for every 4.5 linear metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: Excluding accessory parking lots for a community recreation use or a school use, accessory parking lots shall contain soft landscaping, as per the following requirements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: for every 10 parking spaces in a row, a raised landscaped area shall be provided at each end of the row (Diagram 22);

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: each raised landscaped area shall be delineated with curbs and shall contain a minimum of one tree (Diagram 22) that are not shrubs, with a minimum base caliper of 50 millimetres; and (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where permitted in Part XIII, an accessory parking lot that is
provisions.text: each raised landscaped area's ground area shall include soft landscaping. Diagram 22: Raised landscaped areas within accessory parking lots, per Subsection 417(2) Soft Landscaping on Flat Roofs

sections.title_label_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft landscaping shall be required on any main building with a flat roof or a flat-roofed addition within a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone, on no less than 40% of the combined portions of the roof that are flat. (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E- Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: Portions of a flat roof covered by the following equipment or infrastructure shall not be counted towards the required amount of soft landscaping under Subsection 418(1):

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: mechanical equipment;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: solar collection equipment;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: stormwater infrastructure;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: rooftop greenhouses; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: helipads on a hospital rooftop.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: The soft landscaping on flat roofs, as per the requirements of Subsection 418(1), shall only apply to the areas of the roof that meet the following minimum requirements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: 10.0 contiguous square metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: one linear dimension exceeding 2.0 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: The soft landscaping required under Subsection 418(1) shall not apply to a flat- roofed addition of less than 50.0 contiguous square metres in area. (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: Soft landscaping on rooftops does not need to be accessible to a building's occupants, unless it is being provided to meet the requirements of Section 67.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 418(2) to 418(4), soft
provisions.text: Repealed (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24) Landscaping Treatment for the Roof Slabs of Underground Parking Structures

sections.title_label_raw: In any zone, the roof slab of an underground parking structure,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any zone, the roof slab of an underground parking structure,
provisions.text: In any zone, the roof slab of an underground parking structure, which protrudes above grade, shall be treated with soft landscaping or hard landscaping on any above grade portion that is exposed.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any zone, the roof slab of an underground parking structure,
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)
